signIn.tienesCuenta: Do you already have an account?

inicioLogueado.elige_y_empieza: Select a department and start exploring the magic of each panorama that Bolivia, a country full of culture, has to offer.

wishlist.title: YOUR FAVORITE PLACES
wishlist.empty: You don't have any favorite places yet

modal.title: Remove from favorites?
modal.message: Are you sure you want to remove this place from your favorites list? This action cannot be undone.

cristo.name: Christ of Concord
cristo.description: The Christ of Concord is considered the largest statue of Jesus in existence. Even surpassing Christ the Redeemer in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

tiwanaku.name: Tiwanaku
tiwanaku.description: Spiritual and political center of the Tiwanaku culture, one of the most important civilizations in pre-Columbian America.

uyuni.name: Salar de Uyuni
uyuni.description: The world's largest salt flat, covering more than 10,000 km². A unique and surreal landscape.

parqueFamilia.name: Family Park
parqueFamilia.description: Family recreational area with playgrounds, green areas and spaces for outdoor activities.

casaMoneda.name: Casa de la Moneda
casaMoneda.description: Numismatic and historical museum that holds the history of currency in Bolivia and South America.
